title: Sun and Moon
overview: Sun and Moon is a fantasy story about conflicts between opposites. The story takes place in a fictional medieval kingdom named Ryhmin. Ryhmin is being tested by its surrounding wilderness, where the greater spirit Muinein controls the events of the story. Disagreement about the use of magic has divided the people of Ryhmin. Some see magic as an opportunity to better the world, others fear it will lead to Ryhmin's destruction. Is there a balance?
